series_metadata.series_description: These records relate to the Farmer''s Market Nutrition Program (FMNP).The Ohio Depatment of Health and the Department of Agriculture agreed to promote understanding of the FMNP, and the ODA recruited farmers to accept FMNP coupons for produce they sold at farmer''s markets.("WIC" is a program for women, infants, and children.) The Ohio Dept. of Agriculture is no longer involved with the WIC/Farmer''s Market Nutrition Program.
